subcodes.first_line: He hath ever created whatsoever He willeth, as He willeth, and fashioned whatsoever He desireth through whatsoever means He desireth. No cause existed save His creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لم یزل یبدع ما یشآء کما یشآء و یخترع ما یرید بما یرید لم یکن علة الا انشائک
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God the cause of creation, @creation of the world, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
